raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "nascees wairs manna fwehta Kal-
na deht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet es atlizzinaschu ta-
wâ Widdû behdtgus un nabba-
gus Laudis/ tee palaiditces uhs
ta KUNGA Wahrdn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee Atlikkuschee no Isra-
eka ne darrihs Netaifnibu/ nedg
runnahs Mellus/ un winnu
Muttê ne taps wiltiga Watloda
atrasta/ bet tee gannifees/ un
apgilfees/ un neweens tohs is-
truhzinahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Dsed preezigt tu Zianas
Meita/ gatvile Israël/ preeza-
jees un lihgfmojees no winnas
Sirds/ tu Jerusalemes Meita.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS irr tawu
Sohdibu atrahwis/ winsch irr
tawu Eenaidneeku atslauztjs.
Tas KUNGS tas Israëta Reh-
ninsch irr tawâ Widdû/ tu ne
redsejt wairs Laununu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tai Deenâ taps uhs Je-
rusalemt fazzihts: Ne bibsteees/
ak Ziana! Lai tarwas Rohkas ne
nogurst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS taws
Deews irr tawâ Widdû/ weens
stiprs Pesitajs/ winsch preeza-
fees pahr tewim ar Lihgfmibas/
winsch klusa zecitis eeksch ta-
was Mihlestibas/ winsch preeza-
tees pahr tewim ar Gawilecha-
nas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es fapulzinaschu tohs/
kas noskummuschi bija tahs Sa-
eeschanas deht/ tee irr no tewim:
Ta Apmehdischana irr weena
Nasta us winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Raugi/ tanni Laika no-
maitaschu es wiffus tawns No-
spaiditajns/ un es pasargafschu
to Klipbu/ un fapulzinaschu to
Jsdshitu/ un eezelichu tohs par
weenu Teikfschanu/ un par wee-
nu Slatvu wiffâ tai Semmê/
fur tee bija Kannâ darriti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tanni Laika atweddischu
es juhs/ un to Brihdt fapulzi-
naschu es juhs. Jo es eezelfschu
juhs par weenu Slawu/ un par
weenu Teikfschanu starp wiffeem
Semmes Laudim/ kad es juhsu
Zeetumu preefsch juhsahm Azzim
nowehrfsichu/ takla tas KUNgs.
Ta Praweeta Zewanijus Gals.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
